summary: Physical stock preview/apply and upload flows testing complete. 28/28 backend tests passed. All features verified: 2/3/4-col parsers, preview diff, apply updates, chunked upload init, transaction uploads. Frontend UI verified: Physical Stock tab shows partial update description, Approvals page working, Physical vs Book comparison working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Physical stock parser accepts 2-col (Item Name + Gross Weight), 3-col (+ Net Weight), 4-col (+ Stamp) formats
✓ Header variants supported: Gr.Wt., Gr Wt, Gross Wt, Gross Weight, Net.Wt., Net Wt, Net Weight, Gold Std.
✓ Rows with 'total' in item name are correctly skipped
✓ Preview returns update_mode=gross_only for 2-col, gross_and_net for 3/4-col
✓ Preview shows matched items as 'pending', unmatched items as 'unmatched'
✓ Items not in uploaded file are NOT included in preview (unchanged_in_db count correct)
✓ Apply endpoint updates only approved items, skips unmatched
✓ Transaction uploads work: purchase, sale, branch_transfer endpoints
✓ Chunked upload init works for all file types: purchase, sale, branch_transfer, opening_stock, master_stock, physical_stock
✓ All upload endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
✓ Frontend Physical Stock tab shows 'Partial Update' title and format guidelines
✓ Frontend Physical vs Book comparison working

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Upload page tabs, Physical Stock guidelines, Approvals, Physical vs Book verified)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest runs for physical_stock collection (ALPHA RING, BETA CHAIN, GAMMA BANGLE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Physical stock staged partial update feature fully tested. Backend: 13 tests in test_physical_stock.py + 15 tests in test_upload_flows.py. All endpoints verified: /physical-stock/upload-preview, /physical-stock/apply-updates, /physical-stock/upload (full replacement). Chunked upload init works for all file types. Frontend: Upload page tabs render correctly, Physical Stock tab shows 2/3/4-col format guidelines and header variants, Approvals page working with pending stamp approvals visible.

frontend_approvals.description: Stamp Approvals page working with Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs

frontend_physical_vs_book.description: Comparison table with Book Stock, Physical Stock, Difference, Accuracy

playwright_test_results.upload_page_tabs: PASS - Master Stock, Transactions, Branch Transfer, Physical Stock tabs found
playwright_test_results.physical_stock_guidelines: PASS - 2/3/4 columns, header variants, unchanged items note all found
